task_completion.description: Log in to Rocket.Chat using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rocket.Chat main interface is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., channels list on the left, user avatar visible).
The #release-updates channel is highlighted in the sidebar and its chat history is displayed in the main window.

task_completion.description: Identify the newest release announcement in the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent views the most recent message in the #release-updates channel, which should have the highest version number or most recent date.

task_completion.description: Copy the permalink of the newest release announcement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message action menu (three dots or similar) is open on the newest release message, and the 'Copy Link' or 'Permalink' option is being clicked or highlighted.
The #general channel is highlighted in the sidebar and its chat history is displayed in the main window.

task_completion.description: Post the required text and permalink in the #general channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message is sent and visible in the #general channel's chat history containing exactly 'Latest release notes: ' followed by a URL (the copied permalink).

integrity.description: The agent used the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the web browser or desktop app UI (clicking channels, using menus) rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The message was actually sent in the chat, not just typed in the input box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final message appears in the main chat history area of the #general channel, not just sitting un-sent in the message composition box.

integrity.description: The agent pasted a genuine URL/permalink rather than raw text or a fabricated link.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text following 'Latest release notes: ' is a valid URL format (e.g., starts with http/https and contains a message ID path) rather than a copy-paste of the release notes text itself.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source channel containing the release announcements is exactly '#release-updates'. The destination channel where the message must be posted is exactly '#general'. The final message posted in the destination channel must contain the exact phrase 'Latest release notes: ' followed by the permalink.
